one_line_verdict: A visceral, thought-provoking horror for fans of social-commentary genre films — worth catching in theaters for the immersive dread, but squeamish viewers should wait for streaming.
english_note: Contemporary dialogue, minimal jargon; internet/content moderation references are intuitive and widely understood.
credits_detail: No credits scene expected — Goldhaber's style favors clean, bleak endings with no post-credits payoff. (Speculative)
one_line_summary: A content moderator descends into horror — elevated, internet-age dread that gets under your skin.
